$comment: JSON Schema validation schema for Zoho WorkDrive chunk context objects. HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED — see SECURITY_AUDIT.md.

chunk_id.description: Unique identifier for this WorkDrive content chunk

brand_tag.description: Manufacturer brand this chunk belongs to — used for brand isolation gate

content.description: Text content of the chunk — must not be truncated

index_age_days.description: Age of the WorkDrive index in days — must be <= 7 to pass freshness gate

confidence.description: Chunk relevance confidence — LOW blocks injection

source_file_id.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: WorkDrive file ID for audit trail

numeric_values.description: Extracted numeric values from chunk for traceability checks
